Headline: Closure - St Michael Abbey School, Worcestershire
Info: St Michael Abbey School in Tenbury has announced it will permanently cease operating as a day and boarding school at the end of the current academic year, less than a year after it opened.

Headline: Closure - Kirkton of Largo Primary (State), Fife
Info: Councillors have agreed the final step to permanently close Kirkton of Largo Primary School, which was mothballed in January after its pupil roll fell to zero.

Headline: Closure Update - Malvern St James, Worcestershire
Info: Parents have launched a campaign to save Malvern St James from closure, with the school confirming that conversations regarding its future are ongoing and all expressions of interest are being considered.
